label: Options Chain
description: Options chain and volatility surface for the selected underlying. Shows calls, puts, greeks, and IV per strike.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: dynamic() loading fallbacks for both sub-components; OptionsChain has isLoading handler; VolSurfaceChart has internal loading state.

0.7.note: VolSurfaceChart renders 'No vol surface data' empty state; OptionsChain shows 'No live data -- displaying sample options chain'.

0.8.note: OptionsChain renders 'API unavailable -- showing mock data' on isError.
